From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

[![logo](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/99/Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg/40px-Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg)

Look up ***[India](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/India "wiktionary:India")***, ***[india](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/india "wiktionary:india")***, ***[Indïa](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/Ind%C3%AFa "wiktionary:Indïa")***, ***[Índia](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/%C3%8Dndia "wiktionary:Índia")***, or ***[índia](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/%C3%ADndia "wiktionary:índia")*** in Wiktionary, the free dictionary.

**[India](/wiki/India "India")** is a country in South Asia.

**India** may also refer to:

## Places

* India, a village in [Butor Commune](/wiki/Butor,_Transnistria "Butor, Transnistria"), Transnistria, Moldova
* [India, Texas](/wiki/India,_Texas "India, Texas"), an unincorporated community in the United States

### Historical

* [Indian subcontinent](/wiki/Indian_subcontinent "Indian subcontinent"), inclusive of India's neighboring countries
* [India (Herodotus)](/wiki/India_(Herodotus) "India (Herodotus)"), the location of historic India according to Herodotus
* [British Indian Empire](/wiki/British_Raj "British Raj") (British Raj)
* [Dominion of India](/wiki/Dominion_of_India "Dominion of India") or Union of India (1947 to 1950), the Republic of India before the adoption of its constitution
* [India (East Syriac Ecclesiastical Province)](/wiki/India_(East_Syriac_Ecclesiastical_Province) "India (East Syriac Ecclesiastical Province)"), a historical ecclesiastical province of the Church of the East
* [Greater India](/wiki/Greater_India "Greater India"), the historical extent of Indian culture beyond the Indian subcontinent
* [India (word)](/wiki/India_(word) "India (word)"), the name of the country, including historical appellations

## Arts and entertainment

### Literature

* [*India* (Al-Biruni)](/wiki/India_(Al-Biruni) "India (Al-Biruni)"), an 11th-century book on India by Al-Biruni
* *[India: A Million Mutinies Now](/wiki/India:_A_Million_Mutinies_Now "India: A Million Mutinies Now")*, a 1990 book by Indo-Trinidadian writer V. S. Naipaul
* *[India: A Wounded Civilization](/wiki/India:_A_Wounded_Civilization "India: A Wounded Civilization")*, a 1977 book, prequel to the 1990 work, about the history of India by V. S. Naipaul
* *[India: From Midnight to the Millennium](/wiki/India:_From_Midnight_to_the_Millennium "India: From Midnight to the Millennium")*, a 1997 book about the history of modern India by Shashi Tharoor
* *[India: The Emerging Giant](/wiki/India:_The_Emerging_Giant "India: The Emerging Giant")*, a 2008 book about Indian economic growth by Arvind Panagariya
* *[India: The Rise of an Asian Giant](/wiki/India:_The_Rise_of_an_Asian_Giant "India: The Rise of an Asian Giant")*, a 2008 book about contemporary Indian economy and its influence
* *[India: The Urban Transition](/wiki/India:_The_Urban_Transition "India: The Urban Transition")*, a 2014 book about urbanization in India by Henrik Valeur

### Films and television

* [*India* (film)](/wiki/India_(film) "India (film)"), a 1959 documentary-style film about India by Roberto Rossellini
* *[India: A Love Story](/wiki/India:_A_Love_Story "India: A Love Story")*, a Brazilian telenovela set in India by Gloria Perez
* *[India: Kingdom of the Tiger](/wiki/India:_Kingdom_of_the_Tiger "India: Kingdom of the Tiger")*, 2002 IMAX documentary based on the writings of Jim Corbett about the tigers of India
* *[India: Nature's Wonderland](/wiki/India:_Nature%27s_Wonderland "India: Nature's Wonderland")*, a 2015 nature documentary about India by the BBC
* *[India: The Modi Question](/wiki/India:_The_Modi_Question "India: The Modi Question")*, a 2023 BBC documentary television series about Indian premier Narendra Modi

### Music

* [La India](/wiki/La_India "La India") (born 1969), salsa singer from Puerto Rico
* *[Índia](/wiki/%C3%8Dndia "Índia")*, Gal Costa album (1973)
* *[India?](/wiki/India%3F "India?")*, a 1984 album by Suns of Arqa
* [*India* (Vega album)](/wiki/India_(Vega_album) "India (Vega album)") (2003)
* [*India* (Xandria album)](/wiki/India_(Xandria_album) "India (Xandria album)") (2005)
* "India", a song by John Coltrane from *[Impressions](/wiki/Impressions_(John_Coltrane_album) "Impressions (John Coltrane album)")*
* "India", a song by [Edvin Marton](/wiki/Edvin_Marton "Edvin Marton") from *Virtuoso*
* "India", a song by the Psychedelic Furs from [*The Psychedelic Furs*](/wiki/The_Psychedelic_Furs_(album) "The Psychedelic Furs (album)")
* "India", a song by Puressence from [*Puressence*](/wiki/Puressence_(album) "Puressence (album)")
* "India", a 1982 song by Roxy Music from [*Avalon*](/wiki/Avalon_(Roxy_Music_album) "Avalon (Roxy Music album)")
* "India", a song by Sadist from *[Tribe](/wiki/Tribe_(Sadist_album) "Tribe (Sadist album)")*

## People

* [India (given name)](/wiki/India_(given_name) "India (given name)"), a given name and list of people with the name
* [India (actress)](/wiki/India_(actress) "India (actress)") (born 1977), pornographic actress and singer
* [Jonathan India](/wiki/Jonathan_India "Jonathan India") (born 1996), American baseball player
* [La India](/wiki/La_India "La India") (born 1969), Puerto Rican singer and songwriter

## Other uses

* [Indian National Developmental Inclusive Alliance](/wiki/Indian_National_Developmental_Inclusive_Alliance "Indian National Developmental Inclusive Alliance"), a political alliance abbreviated as INDIA
* [India (battle honour)](/wiki/India_(battle_honour) "India (battle honour)"), a battle honour awarded to regiments of the British Army between 1787 and 1826
* [India (cat)](/wiki/India_(cat) "India (cat)") (1990–2009), George W. Bush's pet cat
* [India-class submarine](/wiki/India-class_submarine "India-class submarine"), a military submarine design of the Soviet Union
* 45574 India, a British [LMS Jubilee Class](/wiki/LMS_Jubilee_Class "LMS Jubilee Class") locomotive
* India, a letter in the [NATO phonetic alphabet](/wiki/NATO_phonetic_alphabet "NATO phonetic alphabet")
* [India (wine)](/wiki/India_(wine) "India (wine)"), variety of wine from India

* [Little India](/wiki/Little_India "Little India"), an environment that is outside India
* [India Meridionalis](/wiki/India_Meridionalis "India Meridionalis"), a phantom peninsula formerly believed to lie east of Malaysia
* [India Superior](/wiki/India_Superior "India Superior") and Alta India ("Upper India"), an area of this peninsula and/or the Americas
* [India tag](/wiki/India_tag "India tag"), an item of stationery
